name: Lisa
comment:
# Lisa

    A simple lisp
    Example:
    ```
    (def fib (n)
        (if (<= n 2) 1
            (-
                (fib (- n 1))
                (fib (- n 2)))))
    (var fib10 (fib 10))
    ```

    @docs parseProgram
    @docs parseProgramToJson
    @docs parseExpression
    @docs parseExpressionToJson
